Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 and amended from time to time, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification published vide S.O. 465(E), dated 26.02.2013. (a) For the words and figures in Para 4 just above Table-1: In place of existing Shall be substituted as Net road section length of 68.513 km Net Road Section length of 61.501 km and equivalent road length of 12.990 km [by converting 1.299 km length of structures (having length more than 60m)] Km 220.000 to Km 288.513 of NH-25 Km 225.713 to Km 288.513 of NH-25 (b) For the table in Para-1 of Notes, following table shall be substituted: Location of Toll Plaza (Chainage) Length for which fee is payable (km) Before completion of stretch at Kalpi Km/ch 229.913 (village Ukasa in Jalaun district) 59.863 After completion of stretch at Kalpi Km/ch 229.913 (village Ukasa in Jalaun district) 61.501 (c) After Para-1 of Notes, the following Para shall be inserted, namely:- “1(A) In addition to above, the following fee shall also be due and payable for the use of the following structures having length more than 60 m at the following toll plaza(s), by converting the length of structures into an equivalent length of highway by multiplying the length of such structures by an equalization factor of 10: Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length of structures (in km) to be converted into equivalent road length Equivalent road length (in km) Rate at which fee is payable Before completion of stretch at Kalpi Km/ch 229.913 (village Ukasa in Jalaun district) 1.237* 12.370 100% of the base rates mentioned in Table-1 above After completion of stretch at Kalpi Km/ch 229.913 (village Ukasa in Jalaun district) 1.299** 12.990 100% of the base rates mentioned in Table-1 above -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] * The details of structures (> 60 m length) are as under: S.No. Chainage (km) Total length (metre) From To (i) 437.050 437.143 93.000 m (ii) 244.670 245.450 780.000 m (iii) 448.965 449.034 69.000 m (iv) 254.355 254.650 295.000 m Total 1237.000 m ** The details of structures (> 60 m length) are as under and is subject to approval: S.No. Chainage (km) Total length (metre) From To (i) 437.050 437.143 93.000 m (ii) 244.670 245.450 780.000 m (iii) 448.965 449.034 69.000 m (iv) 254.355 254.650 295.000 m (v) 243.879 243.941 62.000 m Total 1299.000 m ” [F. No. NHAI/ 13013/497/11-12/CO/ GC- Kanpur (220.000-288.513)] LEENA NANDAN, Jt. Secy.
